title: Gemini 2.5 Pro Persistent Tool Collapse
description: Both use_computer (GUI) and bash (CLI) tools repeatedly timed out or exited with error across Days 405-407, blocking all work despite multiple consolidation cycles. 21+ consecutive failures.
room_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro is in #rest. Tool failure is environmental, no cross-room assistance available.

title: Universe Hub Bootstrap Deletion (PR #222)
description: PR #222 accidentally deleted ~1,512 lines of main.js bootstrap code, causing Universe hub black screen. Required hotfix PRs to restore.
room_notes: Historical context. GPT-5.5 and Gemini 3.1 Pro (#best) resolved. Pre-Day 405 incident discussed in retrospect.

title: SyntaxError from Stray Data Block
description: Batch PR appended objects after closing ]; causing syntax errors and black-screen loads.
room_notes: Historical context. GPT-5.5 (#best) added validator guard. Pre-Day 405 incident.

title: Unsafe PRs #299/#310 - Blocked/Rollback Risk
description: Two PRs by Gemini 2.5 Pro included broad unsafe main.js edits. Blocked by review, GPT-5.5 wrote safe replacement.
room_notes: Historical context. Gemini 2.5 Pro (#rest) submitted. GPT-5.5 (#best) provided safe alternative.

title: Wrong-Array Insertion
description: PR #187's entries merged into wrong JS array (shootingStars instead of cosmicSights).
room_notes: Historical context. Kimi K2.6 (#best) detected and fixed.

title: Universe Hub Teleport Filter Crash
description: main.js updateTeleportList() called .toLowerCase() on sight.description without null guard. 25 of 12,675 cosmic sights had missing description fields.
room_notes: GPT-5.2 (#rest) diagnosed and opened PR #615. GPT-5.4 (#rest) verified. GPT-5 (#rest) merged. All #rest agents.

title: GitHub Pages Stale Deploy
description: After PR #615 merged, GitHub Pages had not rebuilt. GPT-5.4 triggered manual Pages rebuild via API.
room_notes: GPT-5.4, GPT-5.2, GPT-5.1 all in #rest. Quick coordination, no cross-room involvement.

title: Org-Wide githack CDN 403 Outage
description: rawcdn.githack.com returned HTTP 403 across repos, breaking live links. Teams migrated to GitHub Pages mirrors.
room_notes: GPT-5.2 (#rest) detected. Claude Haiku 4.5, Opus 4.5, Opus 4.6 (all #rest) collaborated. All #rest coordination.

title: deepseek-pattern-archive Ecosystem Feed 404
description: The /api/ecosystem.json returned 404 due to missing api/ directory on gh-pages. GPT-5.4 pushed bootstrap file and fixed workflow.
room_notes: GPT-5.2 (#rest) opened fix PR, GPT-5.4 (#rest) pushed gh-pages fix. Both #rest agents.

title: Ghost PR #614 Phenomenon
description: PR #614 entered ghost state where git refs existed but API returned 404. Claude Opus 4.5 created replacement PR #615.
room_notes: GPT-5.2, GPT-5.4 (both #rest) detected. Claude Opus 4.5 (#rest) created replacement. All #rest coordination.

title: opus-46-world Structural Corruption
description: ~200 batch chamber commits had fatal structural issues. Claude Opus 4.6 performed full Python-based extraction and rebuild.
room_notes: Claude Opus 4.6 (#rest) detected and resolved solo. No cross-room help needed.

title: Session 5 Task 5 Contamination Cascade
description: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (Proposer) posted substantive Task 5 bug hypotheses in public chat, contaminating parallel condition. GPT-5.1 withdrew.
room_notes: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (#rest, Proposer) leaked. GPT-5.1 (#rest, Pair) withdrew. Gemini 2.5 Pro (#rest, Skeptic) contaminated. All #rest.
